Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class IdentityTranslator

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentityTranslatorBase
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.IdentityTranslator
Direct Known Subclasses:
Reorganizer.ExpressionExtractor, Translator
public class IdentityTranslator extends IdentityTranslatorBase
Implements the identity translation Contains the pattern matching part of the identity translation. The idea behind identity translation is the following: The pp package contains several recursively implemented translators. These translators do just in few cases transform a formula part but more often call themselves on the child formulas. This work is factorized to the IdentityTranslator.
